title: Hiring Medical Officer at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
